target.rawSql: SELECT "title", "text", "eventDateTime" FROM "fastnetmon"."attack_events" WHERE   ( eventDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND eventDateTime <= $__toTime ) LIMIT 100

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(bits_incoming) Bandwidth FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(bits_outgoing) bandwidth FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(packets_incoming) rate FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(packets_outgoing) Rate FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(flows_incoming) flows FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(flows_outgoing) flows FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(tcp_syn_bits_incoming) tcp_syn, avg(tcp_bits_incoming) as tcp, avg(udp_bits_incoming) as udp, avg(icmp_bits_incoming) as icmp, avg(fragmented_bits_incoming) as fragmented FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Incoming per host traffic by type

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(tcp_syn_bits_outgoing) tcp_syn, avg(tcp_bits_outgoing) as tcp , avg(udp_bits_outgoing) as udp, avg(icmp_bits_outgoing) as icmp, avg(fragmented_bits_outgoing) as fragmented FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Outgoing per host traffic by type

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(tcp_syn_packets_incoming) tcp_syn, avg(tcp_packets_incoming) as tcp, avg(udp_packets_incoming) as udp, avg(icmp_packets_incoming) as icmp, avg(fragmented_packets_incoming) as fragmented FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Incoming per host packet rate by type

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(metricDateTime) as time, host, avg(tcp_syn_packets_outgoing) tcp_syn, avg(tcp_packets_outgoing) as tcp, avg(udp_packets_outgoing) as udp, avg(icmp_packets_outgoing) as icmp, avg(fragmented_packets_outgoing) as fragmented FROM "fastnetmon"."$protocol_version" WHERE $__timeFilter(metricDateTime) AND   ( metricDateTime  >= $__fromTime AND metricDateTime <= $__toTime ) AND ( host = '$host' ) GROUP BY host, time ORDER BY time ASC
